# Exotiq

> Luxury fleet management platform for exotic and high-end vehicle rentals.

## Pages

- [/](/): Product overview and platform capabilities for luxury fleet operators.
- [/welcome](/welcome): Onboarding landing page for new fleet operators getting started with Exotiq.
- [/terms](/terms): Terms of Service governing platform use.
- [/privacy](/privacy): Privacy Policy explaining data collection, processing, and user rights.
- [/acceptable-use](/acceptable-use): Acceptable Use Policy outlining permitted and prohibited activities.
- [/data-processing](/data-processing): Data Processing Agreement and DPA terms for enterprise customers.
